tasks.completion_summary: Audited if/elif/else/fi: appended Directive 10 section to interactive-parity-audit.md; added 3 differential tests
Audited for loops: appended Directive 10 section; added 3 differential tests
Audited while/until loops: appended Directive 10 section; added 2 differential tests
Audited functions: appended Directive 10 section; added 3 differential tests including 2 Golden-mode tests documenting known bugs
Fixed function return N: Invoke-BashEcho sets LASTEXITCODE=0 on success; upgraded differential test from Golden to Equal
Fixed compound AND condition in if: EmitConditionAndOrList handles &&/|| in condition contexts; upgraded Differential_If_CompoundAndCondition to EqualAsync
Fixed recursive function positional args: EmitFunction wraps body with save/restore of $global:BashPositional; also fixed $N in arithmetic subs; upgraded Differential_Function_Recursion to EqualAsync

Audited Glob+brace expansion: appended Directive 10 section; added 12 differential tests (10 EqualAsync, 2 GoldenAsync for known bugs: letter range {a..e} and nested braces {a,b{1,2},c}); all 612 core + 12 diff tests pass
Audited case/esac: appended Directive 10 section; added 10 differential tests; fixed bare-literal case subject bug (EmitCaseExpr helper in PsEmitter.cs)

Audited logical operators (&&, ||, !): appended Directive 10 section; added 13 differential tests (11 EqualAsync, 2 GoldenAsync documenting known bugs: ! in AndOrList chain causes PS syntax error, LASTEXITCODE not global after ! pipeline)

Audited command substitution ($(cmd), backtick, $((arith)), process sub): appended Directive 10 section; added 11 differential tests (9 EqualAsync, 2 GoldenAsync); surfaced EmitSubshell-in-pipeline bug

Audited redirections (>, >>, <, 2>&1, heredoc, herestring): appended Directive 10 section; added 12 differential tests (11 EqualAsync, 1 GoldenAsync for $USER heredoc); found <<-EOF strip-tabs and &>file gaps

Audited Pipes (| and |&): appended Directive 10 section; added 12 differential tests (8 EqualAsync, 3 GoldenAsync documenting known bugs, 1 skipped); documented 5 known bugs including grep -q exit code, broken pipe SIGPIPE, pipefail PIPESTATUS

Audited variable expansion: appended Directive 10 section; added 32 differential tests (25 EqualAsync, 7 GoldenAsync documenting known bugs: set -- unquoted args, glob-wildcard in ##/%%, first-only substitution). Surfaced 4 parity bugs.

Audited background jobs (&, wait, jobs, kill): appended Directive 10 section; added 8 differential tests (6 EqualAsync skip-on-Windows, 2 GoldenAsync for platform-varying output); documented 5 known bugs including stdout-not-forwarded, $! inline wait ordering, jobs format mismatch

Audited simple commands + quoting: appended Directive 10 section to interactive-parity-audit.md; added 17 differential tests (13 EqualAsync, 4 GoldenAsync documenting known bugs: \$ in double-quotes drops literal, empty unquoted var not elided, env-var prefix leaks to shell, adjacent quoted parts not concatenated). $'...' ANSI-C quoting gap documented.

Implemented real Invoke-BashEval: added ValueFromRemainingArguments for multi-arg join, nesting-depth guard (__BashEvalDepth cap 5), ProcessSource helper; added 3 cmdlet tests + 5 differential tests (3 EqualAsync, 2 GoldenAsync). Pre-existing test failure (InvokeBashEval_Definitions_LandInCallerScope) confirmed unchanged.

Catalogued bash init hook patterns for fnm, direnv, nodenv, rbenv, pyenv, zoxide, starship. Wrote verbatim hook patterns to docs/research/on-cd-patterns/{tool}.sh with metadata headers. Produced README.md with summary table and minimum pwsh hook API.

Wrote docs/specs/on-cd-hooks.md: full API spec for Register-BashChpwdHook, Register-BashPromptHook, Unregister-*, Get-BashHook; decided scope (process-global), firing semantics, bash/pwsh mapping (PROMPT_COMMAND, zsh chpwd, trap DEBUG not supported), direnv/fnm integration examples, HookRegistry/BashHookInfo C# shapes, acceptance criteria.

Implemented HookRegistry singleton with ConcurrentDictionary, HookKind enum, BashHookInfo output type, 5 cmdlets (Register-BashChpwdHook, Register-BashPromptHook, Unregister-BashChpwdHook, Unregister-BashPromptHook, Get-BashHook), updated PsBash.Cmdlets.psd1 CmdletsToExport, wrote 13 passing tests covering register/get/unregister/fire semantics and exception isolation.

Added sections 13-17 to on-cd-hooks.md (semantic differences vs bash, coexistence with PSReadLine/oh-my-posh/Starship, known gaps, unregistration lifecycle, error handling details) and Section 9 Hooks cross-reference to emitter-strategy.md.

Emitter: trap DEBUG -> Register-BashChpwdHook with first-use warning; trap - DEBUG -> Unregister-BashChpwdHook; PROMPT_COMMAND='CMD' -> Register-BashPromptHook; unset PROMPT_COMMAND -> Unregister-BashPromptHook. Non-DEBUG trap and non-PROMPT_COMMAND unset pass through unchanged.

Implemented Enable-BashHookPrompt/Disable-BashHookPrompt in PsBash.psm1: wrapper installs around 'prompt' function, calls HookRegistry.FirePrompt on tick, preserves original prompt output. Auto-enable wired into Register-BashChpwdHook and Register-BashPromptHook cmdlets. Exported from module manifest. 9 new tests: hook fires on cd, no spurious fire, disable restores prompt, idempotent enable, auto-enable side effect.

Added OnCdIntegrationTests.cs with 6 [SkippableFact] E2E tests (3 fnm, 3 direnv); added Xunit.SkippableFact to csproj; added fnm install step to publish.yml gated on ubuntu-latest. All 6 tests skip gracefully when tool missing; fnm tests pass when fnm installed.

Fixed 3 runtime parity bugs: (1) Invoke-BashBackground now forwards child stdout/stderr via event handlers; (2) $global:BashFlags='hB' and $global:BashLastArg='' initialized at module load, BashLastArg tracked in Invoke-BashEcho; (3) grep -q/-Q/--quiet/--silent added to Invoke-BashGrep with early-exit; EmitAndOrList pipeline case changed from $(& {...}) to pipeline; $(if (LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error '' }) to correctly propagate $? to PS chain operators. Updated 16 stale test expectations (BoolExpr-in-chain, EnvPair save/restore, set-- quoting, extended test parens). GrepQMatches and GrepQNoMatch upgraded from GoldenAsync to EqualAsync.

Tab completion context-aware and quote-aware: SplitAtWordBoundaryQuoteAware tracks open quotes and puts open-quote char in base; IsFirstWord recognizes | || && ; & $( as command-boundary resets; IsAfterRedirectOp detects > < >> targets; Complete() strips $( prefix for command-sub context; ApplyCompletion auto-closes double-quotes for paths-with-spaces. 20 new unit tests in TabCompleterContextTests.

T01 IWorker seam: created IWorker interface (ExecuteAsync/QueryAsync/HasExited/OutputCallback contract, IAsyncDisposable); PwshWorker now implements IWorker with ObjectDisposedException guards in ExecuteAsync/QueryAsync; Program.cs and InteractiveShell.cs hold IWorker via Func<Task<IWorker>> factory delegate; 5 new IWorkerContractTests (5 pass, 0 fail). PsBash.Core.Tests: 628/628 pass (was 623). Diff vs baseline: pre-existing flake/known-bug failures only; no new regressions.

CtrlRSearch behavioral tests: added internal SimulateAsync entry point (Queue<ConsoleKeyInfo> key injection, no real console required); exposed ResultCount, SelectedIndex, SelectedCommand, CurrentQuery, CwdFilterEnabled as internal properties. 22 new CtrlRSearchBehaviorTests covering: history loading, substring filtering, most-recent-selected, no-match state, Enter execute, Ctrl-R cycling with wrap-around, Esc/Ctrl-C cancel, Tab edit mode, CWD filter toggle, backspace, SQLite persistence across sessions, CWD boost scoring.
